name: Idiopathic collapse at work - comp in Utah?
description: Yes if floor etc. made it worse.[3]

mainEntity.name: Idiopathic collapse at work - comp in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if floor etc. made it worse.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Compensable if work conditions worsened injury, like hard floor.[3] Key factors: (1) Prove actual aggravation; (2) Not just increased risk; (3) Medical evidence; (4) Recent appeals clarify. File with proof. Attorney cites Ackley case.
